meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.
meta.blueprintRefinement: THIS BLUEPRINT MUST BE CONTINUALLY REFINED. After completing any task, before starting the next, re-read this file and assess whether it still accurately captures reality. If any task description is stale, wrong, unclear, or missing context — FIX IT NOW.

globalAlerts.warning: ON TOOLS: Use config.mk custom targets. Limit output. Pipe through tail after tee to build.log. Use 'make find-test-failures'.
CROSS-PLATFORM: ALL checks must pass on macOS, Linux (Docker), Windows (host 'moo'). Zero tolerance.
TIMING: Tests MUST NOT be timing-dependent. No long-running tests. Race detector must pass.
SESSION TIMER: Started 2026-02-20T08:00:00Z. 9h mandate. Verify: make check-session-time.
RULE OF TWO: Two contiguous issue-free subagent reviews before any commit. Same diff. No exceptions.
DEADCODE: NEVER add ignores to .deadcodeignore. Wire up the code or delete it.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: One task at a time, in order. Do not attempt to solve all tasks in a single turn.
mandatoryDirectives.subagentPolicy: Use subagents for Rule of Two review gate ONLY. Work subagents do NOT self-review.
mandatoryDirectives.blueprintRefinement: Continual refinement required. After every task, re-read and fix stale descriptions.
mandatoryDirectives.runMakeAfterEveryChange: Run 'make make-all-with-log' after EVERY code change. Zero failures before proceeding.
mandatoryDirectives.commitPolicy: Commit in logical chunks after passing Rule of Two. Do NOT accumulate massive diffs.

statusSection.currentState: Analysis completed. T001-T029 verified and dropped. Initializing new action items (T051-T053) based on consolidated analysis, then continuing T030.
statusSection.priorCompletedWork: T001-T029 completed. P001-P009 (baselines, timer, WIP, DS_Store, module resolution docs, architecture-claude-mux.md, orchestrator->claudemux rename). Plus all prior session work (see CHANGELOG.md).

sequentialTasks.description: Shift per-instance MCP auto-configuration from HTTP listener to stdio subprocess. Update mcp_config.go to generate mcpServers config with `command: osm` and `args: [mcp-instance, --session, xyz]` universally compatible with mcp.json specs.

sequentialTasks.task: T052: Native Go Multiplexing Command (osm claudemux run)
sequentialTasks.description: Create a CLI command matching the behavior of example-08-claude-mux-api.js but fully executed in Go. Read tasks/stdin, partition work via NewPool, auto-provision SpawnOpts, intercept stdout, and launch NewPanel as the user TUI.

sequentialTasks.task: T053: Session Interlock for TUI and MCP
sequentialTasks.description: Wire PTY's NavigateToModel directly into `osm claudemux run`. Ensure TUI renders prompts dynamically, autosolves selection, and synchronizes the MCP handshake via heartbeat verification.

In fetch/: ReadableStream on Response.body, getReader(), reader.read()->Promise<{value,done}>, SSE parsing, chunked encoding, back-pressure via bounded channel. Tests with httptest. Goja JS verification. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T031: macOS process hierarchy fallback for session ID
sequentialTasks.description: session_darwin.go (//go:build darwin): sysctl/libproc process tree, skip ephemeral wrappers, shell/root boundaries, PID+start-time. Update session_other.go build tag. Update docs/session.md. Tests. Run make.
Add 3-5 new built-in goals to goal_builtin.go. Candidates from Anthropic prompt library NOT yet implemented. Each: stateVars, hotSnippets, flagDefs, promptOptions. Full test suite. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T033: Security audit of scripting sandbox
sequentialTasks.description: Audit: ambient authority leaks, require() traversal, exec injection, fetch SSRF, os write restrictions, env secrets, MCP privilege escalation. Fix vulnerabilities. Regression tests. Update docs/security.md. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T034: txtar context root formatting fix
sequentialTasks.description: Fix context.go ToTxtar(): root path outside code block, wrapped in backticks. Failing test first. Fix. Verify. Run make.
Fix computeUniqueSuffixes() in context.go: LCA computation, verify parent tracking, preserve full paths for non-colliding basenames. Failing tests for all 3 scenarios. Fix. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T036: osm mcp make — port of mcp-server-make
sequentialTasks.description: Implement 'osm mcp make' subcommand. Research mcp-server-make. Target caching, cross-platform make detection, session integration. MCP tool: make_run. Shell completion. Tests. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T037: Agent steering via MCP enqueue + session gRPC
sequentialTasks.description: Session-tied Unix socket (gRPC), Windows TCP fallback. Proto: EnqueueTask, InterruptCurrent, GetStatus. Socket: ~/.osm/sessions/<id>/control.sock. Cleanup. Tests with in-process gRPC. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T038: osm mcp parent — Claude Code wrapper + stdio MCP + session socket
sequentialTasks.description: Implement 'osm mcp parent': wrap Claude Code child process, stdio MCP transport, session socket messaging (T037), lifecycle mgmt. MCP tools: enqueue, interrupt, status. Tests. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T039: osm mcp prompt — polymorphic terminal wrapper
sequentialTasks.description: Implement 'osm mcp prompt': Anthropic computer use research (document first), dynamic tool availability, BubbleTea UI, mode detection, go-prompt REPL, adaptive MCP schema. Tests. Run make.

Migrate sync.go/sync_startup.go to go-git v6 for clone/add/commit. Keep pull --rebase as shell-out. Preserve: rebase strategy, conflict detection, sync.local-path, auto-pull, timestamp messages. Tests. Run make.
macOS + Linux + Windows. Zero failures on ALL platforms. Fix regressions from T027-T040.
Update CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] with T027-T040. Keep-a-Changelog format. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T043: Test coverage gap analysis and remediation
sequentialTasks.description: Run 'make cover'. Identify packages below 90%. Add tests focused on error paths, edge cases, platform-specific code, concurrency. Target: 100% effective coverage. Run make.
Update root README.md: full feature set, claude-mux, MCP server, JS modules list, goal system, sync, sessions. Badges. Installation. Quick-start. Verify links. Run make.
Audit completion for ALL commands/subcommands in bash/zsh/fish/powershell. Fix gaps. Test output format. Run make.
Review docs/README.md: every doc indexed. Cross-references valid. docs/reference/ complete for all commands and config keys. Run make.
Run 'make lint' checking deadcode and betteralign. Fix issues. No .deadcodeignore changes. Run make.
macOS + Linux + Windows. Zero failures. FINAL quality gate before commit.
Final CHANGELOG.md covering T043-T047. Verify completeness and format. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T050: Rule of Two commit gate
sequentialTasks.description: Execute Rule of Two: subagent #1 reviews full diff vs HEAD. If PASS: freeze, subagent #2 same diff. Both PASS: commit with Kubernetes-style message. Either FAIL: fix, reset to 0, restart.

continuousVerification.task: Run 'make make-all-with-log' after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY test fails, STOP and fix. Zero tolerance.
continuousVerification.testCoverage: Target 100%. Verify with go tool cover.

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: Use config.mk custom targets. Limit output. Tee to build.log.
No timing-dependent tests. No long-running tests.
Continually refine. After every task fix stale descriptions.
Two contiguous reviews. Same diff. Reset on any code change.
NEVER add .deadcodeignore entries. Wire up or delete.
